esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
// Checkpoint duration (sync + write) is server-level with attributes.type
| WHERE postgresql.bgwriter.duration IS NOT NULL
| EVAL duration_val = TO_DOUBLE(postgresql.bgwriter.duration)
| STATS total_duration_ms = SUM(duration_val) BY service.instance.id
// Threshold: 30 seconds total in window; adjust for your checkpoint frequency
| WHERE total_duration_ms > 30000
